description: Seed weights for deterministic Zi Wei monthly scoring. These numbers are calibration hypotheses, not classical constants.
principles: Main stars and Four Transformations define the frame; minor stars modify it.
Activation and conflict are separate from benefit/risk.
A monthly frame is interpreted inside natal, major-fortune and annual context.
Empty-major-star palaces borrow the opposite palace instead of being scored as a blank frame.
No benefic signal directly cancels a risk signal; mitigation only reduces severity of a specific linked signal.

minorStarCaps.notes: Cap only the minor-star subtotal. Never cap main-star, mutagen, void, or interaction signals.

majorStarDominance.notes: Activation only; do not add benefit/risk merely because a main star exists.

majorFortuneContext.notes: Apply factors only to signals linked to the same palace/frame, never to the whole chart column.
